title: [phase:repair] [family:post-fix-review] [provider_hint:codex] Review the modified files in /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer for remaining high-risk Stripe issues after the latest fix. Focus only on changed files and return concise findings with absolute paths.
summary_text: 1. **Critical**: `validateRedirectUrl` is imported but not exported, so both Edge Functions can fail module initialization (checkout/portal unavailable at runtime). - Import sites: [create-checkout-session/index.ts:8](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts#L8), [customer-portal/index.ts:5](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/customer-portal/index.ts#L5) - Referenced usage: [create-checkout-session/index.ts:60](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts#L60), [customer-portal/index.ts:53](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/customer-portal/index.ts#L53) - Current exports in validation module do not include `validateRedirectUrl`: [validation.ts:260](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/validation.ts#L260), [validation.ts:330](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/validation.ts#L330), [validation.ts:337](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/validation.ts#L337) 2. **High**: Webhook now hard-fails on any subscription `priceId` not present in env-configured allowlist, causing repeated 500 retries and subscription state drift for legacy/rotated prices. - Throw path: [stripe-webhook/index.ts:185](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts#L185) - Source of hard failure: [stripe.ts:30](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts#L30), [stripe.ts:38](/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts#L38) No other remaining **high-risk** Stripe issues were identified in the specified changed files.
